Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The task is to transform this Windows activity system log into a process mining event log

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Ill create a clean analyst friendly event log by grouping events into logical work units cases based on the documents and tasks the user was actively working on

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Each case represents a coherent piece of work such as editing a specific document or handling an email

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill map the raw actions to higher level standardized activity names that make sense for process analysis
